name: Red Clover Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the blossoms and leaves in a 2-cup earthenware teapot.
2. Pour boiling water into the teapot and cover it.
3. Infuse for 5 to 10 minutes over very low heat.
4. If necessary, set the pot on a trivet over the burner to protect it from breaking.
5. Strain the tea into a hot cup.
6. Add a twist of lemon and sweeten with honey.
7. Some fresh mint leaves and/or several dandelion leaves can be used with the clover blossoms.
Note: Red clover blossoms may be dried for tea preparation. Spread the blossoms out in a single layer on a tray and dry them in the sun. Use 1 to 1 1/2 teaspoons of dried flowers per cup of water to make the tea.
Yield: 2 cups.
